title: senecillis dentata
intro: Senecillis dentata, also known as Groundsel or Resurrection Plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
